title: ci/papr: Disable and remove docker on FAH27
body: For now, per discussion e.g. `iptables` rules can interfere.

comments.body: Looks like something is trying to connect to docker after you tried to kill it in the tests.

> Looks like something is trying to connect to docker after you tried to kill it in the tests.

OK, I took a stab at reworking this :arrow_up:  - let's see.

@cgwalters I can make this work for us but I am already doing something similar with the cloud image.  That's why I was asking about having a customized predeployed image for FA27 that ran podman and not docker.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 2cc51db) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Looks like this was obsoleted by https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pull/524
